title: Medication refill request — non-urgent administrative
source: Synthetic case based on Manchester Triage System flowchart 'Unwell Adult'

patient.name: Margaret Liu
patient.chief_complaint: Ran out of blood pressure medication 2 days ago, needs prescription refill, feeling fine
patient.notes: Patient well-appearing, no distress. Came to ER because primary care office is closed on weekend. No headache, chest pain, visual changes, or other symptoms. Blood pressure mildly elevated but patient reports this is typical when off medication.
